name: Try mushroom risotto recipe
notes: TikTok chef made it look easy. Said arborio rice is key. And also said to stir constantly and add broth little by little for creaminess. It really takes patience.

name: Everything Everywhere All At Once
notes: Recommended on TikTok as a mind-bending multiverse movie. Won several Oscars.

name: Sushi Nakazawa NYC
notes: Saw this on a foodie TikTok. Chef trained under Jiro! Make a reservation 2 weeks in advance.

name: Learn 'Heather' by Conan Gray on guitar
notes: Nice fingerpicking technique shown in tutorial. Good beginner-to-intermediate level.

name: Kyoto, Japan travel list
notes: Temples, tea houses, and that bamboo forest. Save for spring trip.

name: Inside Out 2
notes: Pixar sequel just hit theaters, looks super emotional.

name: Books recommended by Billie Eilish
notes: She mentioned 'The Bell Jar' and '1984' in an interview.
